---
title: "Introduction to Google Colab"
source: "Tutorial"
author: "Withheld"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: "Programming Skills"
tech-lang: "Python"
main-format: "Google Colab"
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

You can access this tutorial [here](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/149HV3Eif24PfcXj323fs0Og5VP6EhQJy?usp=sharing)
